references.title: Homogeneous Group Formation in Collaborative Learning Scenarios: An Approach Based on Personality Traits and Genetic Algorithms

annotations.text: Automated group formation remains a key challenge for educators wishing to implement collaborative learning pedagogical activities. The authors propose a genetic algorithm that strives for personality trait homogeneity. The authors perform an experiment with 132 students using the Big 5 framework.
Results show that approach generates better learning outcomes than a strategy of grouping based on students’ preferences.
